title: Fix search functionality and add comprehensive store management form

requirements.text: Debug and fix the search functionality to ensure that when users click the search button or press Enter after typing a Persian product query (e.g., 'گوشی', 'لپ‌تاپ'), the system displays product results instead of showing the 'هنوز جستجویی انجام نشده' message. Verify the complete flow from SearchInput component through useProductSearch hook to the backend searchByProductTitle function.

quotes: علت عدم نمایش نتیجه بعد از فشردن کلید جستجو چیه؟

همه جستجوها.خیر
نام محصول مورد نظر خود را در کادر بالا وارد کنید

acceptanceCriteria: Typing a Persian product name and clicking search triggers the backend searchByProductTitle function
Product results are displayed in the ProductResults component after successful search
The 'هنوز جستجویی انجام نشده' message only appears before the first search, not after clicking search
Loading state is properly shown during search execution
Error handling displays appropriate messages if search fails

requirements.text: Analyze and test the complete search flow in both frontend and backend to identify why search results are not displaying. Check: 1) SearchInput component properly calls the search handler, 2) useProductSearch hook correctly invokes the actor method, 3) backend searchByProductTitle function processes the query and returns results, 4) ProductResults component receives and renders the returned data.

quotes: 1-هردو را انالیز وتست کن2-پیدا کردن مشکل و رفع ان و تصحیح و بهبود عملکرد جستجو

acceptanceCriteria: All console errors related to search are identified and logged
Network requests to the backend are verified in browser DevTools
Backend function execution is verified to return expected product data
Data flow from backend response to ProductResults rendering is confirmed
Any identified issues are fixed to restore full search functionality

requirements.text: Enhance the StoreManagement component to create a comprehensive form that collects all information required by the search engine from users who want to add their stores. The form must include fields for: store name (Persian), store URL/link, city selection (from existing Iranian cities dropdown), reputation score (1-5 stars), and any additional metadata needed for search ranking and product discovery.

quotes: کاربران در منو گزینه ای بنام افزودن فروشگاه خود را میزنن و همه محتوای مورد نیاز موتور جستجو را از انها درخواست و ذخیره کن

نام فروشگاه (فارسی)
- لینک/URL فروشگاه
- شهر محل فروشگاه (برای رتبه‌بندی نزدیکی به قم/تهران)
- امتیاز اعتبار فروشگاه
- سایر اطلاعات مورد نیاز برای جستجو و مقایسه

acceptanceCriteria: Form includes labeled input field for Persian store name with RTL support
Form includes URL input field with validation for proper web addresses
City dropdown shows all Iranian cities from the existing city list
Reputation score selector allows choosing 1-5 stars with visual star display
Form validation prevents submission with empty required fields
All form fields display proper Persian labels and placeholders
Form maintains blue neon styling consistent with the app theme

requirements.text: Update the backend to support persistent storage of user-submitted stores with all required fields: store name, URL, city, reputation score, and any additional metadata. Ensure the addCustomStore function (or equivalent) saves this data to stable storage and makes it available for future search queries.

quotes: همه محتوای مورد نیاز موتور جستجو را از انها درخواست و ذخیره کن
ذخیره‌سازی دائمی**: تمام فروشگاه‌های اضافه شده در بک‌اند ذخیره و در جستجوهای بعدی استفاده می‌شوند

acceptanceCriteria: Backend function accepts all store fields: name, URL, city, reputation score
Store data is persisted in stable storage across canister upgrades
Newly added stores are included in searchByProductTitle results
Backend validates store data before saving (e.g., non-empty name, valid URL format)
Function returns success/failure status to frontend for user feedback

requirements.text: Connect the enhanced StoreManagement form to the backend by implementing the submission handler that calls the backend addCustomStore function with all collected form data. Display success toast notification in Persian when store is added successfully, and error toast if submission fails. Clear the form fields after successful submission.

quotes: ذخیره‌سازی دائمی**: تمام فروشگاه‌های اضافه شده در بک‌اند ذخیره و در جستجوهای بعدی استفاده می‌شوند

acceptanceCriteria: Form submission triggers backend addCustomStore call with all form data
Success toast displays Persian message confirming store was added
Error toast displays Persian message if backend call fails
Form fields are cleared after successful submission
Loading state is shown during submission process
Newly added store appears in the store list immediately after successful submission

constraints: Do not modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Do not edit UI component sources in frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve all existing Persian/RTL text support and blue neon styling theme
Keep existing Store type structure and city data in the backend
nonGoals: Automatic daily data updates from external store APIs
Web scraping functionality to fetch real-time product data
Integration with external services for automatic product discovery
Changes to the existing Header, Footer, or ProductResults components
Modifications to authentication or identity management logic
